basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website iitm.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, or any other equivalent degree with 2+ years relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Associate: B.E./B.Tech. or MTech. in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, or any other equivalent degree. Experience: 2+ years of relevant Experience.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_madras: B.E./B.Tech. or M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, or any other equivalent degree with 2+ years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Madras Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Madras Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate: B.E./B.Tech. or MTech. in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, or any other equivalent degree. Experience: 2+ years of relevant Experience.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras), a premier government institution in India.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Project Associate. This is a contractual position within IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate post under the IIT Madras recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of online applications for the Project Associate post is 14 July 2026. Candidates should apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment is online. Interested candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. What are the required qualifications for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. or M.Tech. in Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, or an equivalent degree, along with 2+ years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Project Associate post at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate position will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for IIT Madras Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Madras Project Associate recruitment. Application is free.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process includes online application submission, shortlisting of candidates, a test/interview, and document verification. Final selection depends on performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job location for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Associate post will be Chennai, Tamil Nadu, specifically at the Indian Institute of Technology Madras campus.
